notes:
Batch A — 67 entries across 5 files.

File breakdown:
- static_commands/mod.rs (17): all doc-comment fragments inside `bitflags!` macro body — extractor false positives (scan_macro_tokens captures /// lines as macro_arg). All flagged extractor_false_positive_doc_comment, target=null.
- terminal/input/slash_commands/mod.rs (14): all user-facing toast/error messages shown via show_error_toast or DismissibleToast. Translated. Placeholders {}, {arg} preserved; slash command names (/rename-tab, /set-tab-color, /open-file, /create-new-project) kept English.
- terminal/model/ansi/mod.rs (15): mix of doc-comments inside lazy_static! (4 entries at lines 78,79,81 → false_positive_doc_comment), one .expect() panic message at line 82 (panic_message), and 12 entries that are safe_debug!/safe_error! tracing macro arguments (deduped to 10 IDs because two appear at multiple lines) → telemetry_payload.
- workflows/categories.rs (12): all user-facing UI labels (sidebar items My/Repository/Team Workflows, accessibility content describing showing filters, empty-list placeholder, search-help text). Translated.
- launch_configs/save_modal.rs (10): 9 user-facing UI/accessibility strings translated; 1 ("File already exists" at line 275) is used in `e.to_string().contains("File already exists")` to match against the inner foreign Error message text from WarpConfig::save_new_launch_config — translating it would break the runtime match. Flagged as protocol_key.

Totals: 35 translated, 32 flagged (20 doc-comment, 11 telemetry, 1 panic, 1 protocol_key), 0 bilingual.

Placeholder/whitespace preservation:
- ID 01KQXQV10GE46J8C0NQY38ZPFW: kept leading \n and trailing space.
- ID 01KQXQV12F4WPYGSCS8F9HFP9F: kept trailing space.
- ID 01KQXQV128VS2MMK7EA7VC7AZD: kept leading space, period rendered as full-width.
- ID 01KQXQV12HV5DM3RQXCZ4Z0CWF: preserved `\n            ` (newline + 12 spaces) line breaks.
- ID 01KQXQV12HDBWVC4WJ0985SMK8 "Unknown tab color '{arg}'. Use one of: {}.": preserved both placeholders {arg} and {}, used half-width quotes around {arg} per source, full-width comma/period elsewhere.

Glossary applied: 工作流 (workflow), 标签页 (tab), 窗格 (pane), 命令块 not applicable, 您 throughout. Slash command names kept English.
